testcase.name: getdepositpaymentPlan
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [{"Deposit":{"Success":true,"Data":{"LocationId":"WATER001","CustomerId":"CUSTOMER001","DocumentNumber":"DEPS00000000032","TotalAmount":100,"InitialInstallmentAmount":25,"StartDate":"2022-01-01","NumberOfInstallments":4,"NumberOfDays":30,"Installment":[{"BillDate":"2022-01-01","DueDate":"2022-01-01","Amount":25,"OutstandingAmount":25,"AmountReceived":0,"ChargeDocument":"","Posted":false},{"BillDate":"2022-01-01","DueDate":"2022-01-02","Amount":25,"OutstandingAmount":25,"AmountReceived":0,"ChargeDocument":"","Posted":false},{"BillDate":"2022-02-01","DueDate":"2022-02-01","Amount":25,"OutstandingAmount":25,"AmountReceived":0,"ChargeDocument":"","Posted":false},{"BillDate":"2022-03-01","DueDate":"2022-03-01","Amount":25,"OutstandingAmount":25,"AmountReceived":0,"ChargeDocument":"","Posted":false}]},"Messages":[]}}] but found [{"Deposit":{"Success":true,"Data":{"LocationId":"ELECWAT001","CustomerId":"CUSTOMER007","DocumentNumber":"DEPS00000000033","TotalAmount":10,"InitialInstallmentAmount":10,"StartDate":"2027-04-12","NumberOfInstallments":1,"NumberOfDays":1,"Installment":[{"BillDate":"2027-04-12","DueDate":"2027-04-12","Amount":10,"OutstandingAmount":0,"AmountReceived":10,"ChargeDocument":"MISC00000000387","Posted":true}]},"Messages":[]}}]
